title: Getting Started with Keiyoushi Extensions Repo
content:
## Getting Started with Keiyoushi Extensions Repo
* Read the steps below to add our repository link into your Mihon/Mihon-fork app
### 1. Add the repo URL
* In our [**Getting Started page**](<https://keiyoushi.github.io/docs/guides/getting-started#adding-the-extension-repo>), tap the "**Add repository**" button to redirect into your compatible app.
-# * **`Invalid repo URL`** error? Ask for help in our <#1193504423964586025> channel
### 2. Replace your existing extensions
* Remove any repo that's not **Keiyoushi** & __uninstall all existing extensions first__, or you won't be able to install/update with our extensions.
### 3. Restart your app & reinstall your extensions now
* If you don't remember the uninstalled extensions, check your app's Browse > Migrate page.

## Questions/issues with finding an extension?
### Unable to find a certain extension within our repo?
1. **Enable 18+ sources** in your app's Settings > Browse page (and restart your app).
2. Check the **language filter** (three-lines icon) for both the __Sources tab__ & __Extensions tab__ in your app's Browse Page.
3. **Search different variations of the source name** ("MangaSite" vs "Manga Site").
4. If it's only numbers in your app's Browse > Migrate page, long-press on the number to copy it, and **search the number** in the Extensions tab.
  * If nothing shows up, then it was replaced or removed, migrate to a different source.
5. Check our [**Extensions list page**](<https://keiyoushi.github.io/extensions>) to see if it's in our repo. If it's not within our repo, see below:
### Source request & reporting issues
* Search open/recently closed requests on our [**GitHub Issues page**](<https://github.com/keiyoushi/extensions-source/issues>) with the source name or error/issue __first__ before opening a new request.

## About Keiyoushi Extensions
* [Give our repo a star](<https://github.com/keiyoushi/extensions>)
* [Source code for our extensions](<https://github.com/keiyoushi/extensions-source>)
